displayName: Merged Pad Annotation Table by Layer
description: Pad-level read metric for annotations across all wells in the selected fleet/pad filtered by layer.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH pad_wells AS (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name), user_annotations AS (SELECT a.annotation_id, a.layer_id, a.rule_concept_id, a.name AS well_name, a.stage_num, a.substage_name, a.start_time, a.end_time, COALESCE(a.timestamp, a.start_time) AS timestamp, a.start_feature, a.end_feature, a.selected_feature, a.annotation_type, a.labeler_id, a.notes, COALESCE(a.source_type, 'user') AS source_type, a.created_by_email, a.updated_by_email, CASE WHEN a.layer_id = 'manual:shared' THEN true WHEN a.layer_id = 'manual:user:' || md5(CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) THEN true WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM datastore:substage_label_layers_v3 l WHERE l.layer_id = a.layer_id AND COALESCE(l.status, 'active') = 'active' AND COALESCE(l.is_editable, true) = true AND (l.owner_email = CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT) OR l.created_by_email = CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT))) THEN true ELSE false END AS can_edit, COALESCE(a.status, 'active') AS status, a.created_at, a.updated_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS color FROM datastore:substage_annotations_v4 a JOIN pad_wells w ON w.name = a.name WHERE COALESCE(a.status, 'active') = 'active' AND (a.layer_id = 'manual:shared' OR a.layer_id = 'manual:user:' || md5(CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM datastore:substage_label_layers_v3 l WHERE l.layer_id = a.layer_id AND COALESCE(l.status, 'active') = 'active' AND (l.owner_email = CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT) OR l.created_by_email = CAST(:current_user_email AS TEXT)))) AND CAST(a.start_time AS timestamp) <= CAST(:end_time AS timestamp) AND CAST(a.end_time AS timestamp) >= CAST(:start_time AS timestamp)), platinum_base AS (SELECT p.name AS well_name, p.stage_num_td AS stage_num, CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts, p.substage FROM featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1 p JOIN pad_wells w ON w.name = p.name WHERE CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST(:start_time AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS TIMESTAMP) <= CAST(:end_time AS TIMESTAMP) AND p.substage IS NOT NULL AND p.substage <> 'NA'), platinum_marks AS (SELECT well_name, stage_num, ts, substage, CASE WHEN substage IS DISTINCT FROM LAG(substage) OVER (PARTITION BY well_name, stage_num ORDER BY ts) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS new_group FROM platinum_base), platinum_groups AS (SELECT well_name, stage_num, ts, substage, SUM(new_group) OVER (PARTITION BY well_name, stage_num ORDER BY ts) AS label_group FROM platinum_marks), platinum_windows AS (SELECT well_name, stage_num, substage, label_group, MIN(ts) AS start_time, MAX(ts) AS end_time FROM platinum_groups GROUP BY well_name, stage_num, substage, label_group), platinum_annotations AS (SELECT md5('platinum|' || well_name || '|' || CAST(stage_num AS TEXT) || '|' || substage || '|' || CAST(start_time AS TEXT) || '|' || CAST(end_time AS TEXT)) AS annotation_id, 'system:model:platinum_substage_labels' AS layer_id, 'platinum_substage_labels' AS rule_concept_id, well_name, stage_num, substage AS substage_name, start_time, end_time, start_time AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS start_feature, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS end_feature, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS selected_feature, CASE WHEN substage IN ('stage_start', 'stage_end') THEN 'point' ELSE 'window' END AS annotation_type, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS notes, 'model' AS source_type, 'system-model' AS created_by_email, 'system-model' AS updated_by_email, false AS can_edit, 'active' AS status, start_time AS created_at, end_time AS updated_at, CASE WHEN substage = 'stage_start' THEN '#8A8FC9' WHEN substage = 'ramp_up' THEN '#FF1892' WHEN substage = 'slurry' THEN '#01FF81' WHEN substage = 'design' THEN '#01FF81' WHEN substage = 'ramp_down' THEN '#FEA804' WHEN substage = 'shut_off' THEN '#830080' WHEN substage = 'stage_end' THEN '#7FB8C2' ELSE '#787878' END AS color FROM platinum_windows WHERE start_time < end_time OR substage IN ('stage_start', 'stage_end')), unioned AS (SELECT * FROM user_annotations UNION ALL SELECT * FROM platinum_annotations) SELECT * FROM unioned WHERE layer_id = :layer_id ORDER BY well_name ASC, start_time ASC, end_time ASC, created_at ASC) q
